hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json
try:
    data = json.load(sys.stdin)
    path = data.get('file_path', '') or data.get('new_path', '')
    if '/src/app/' in path and ('page.tsx' in path or 'page.ts' in path or 'layout.tsx' in path):
        print('\n⚡ SEO ACTIVE — page/layout file detected.')
        print('CLAUDE.md SEO checklist applies. Before committing:')
        print('  □ title tag: keyword first, ends with | True Color Printing Saskatoon')
        print('  □ meta description: 150-160 chars, includes price + location')
        print('  □ H1: one per page, contains primary keyword')
        print('  □ Schema: Service + FAQPage + BreadcrumbList on landing pages')
        print('  □ noindex: cart/checkout/pay/staff pages only')
        print('  □ Sitemap: add to src/app/sitemap.ts if new page')
        print('  Run /truecolor-seo for full checklist + copy sources.')
except:
    pass
" 2>/dev/null || true

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('file_path',''); exit(0 if any(x in f for x in ['data/tables','products-content','CategoryPicker','sitemap','SiteNav','OptionsPanel','ProductConfigurator','quote/page']) else 1)" 2>/dev/null; then cd "/Users/owner/Downloads/TRUE COLOR PRICING /truecolor-estimator" && npm run validate:pricing 2>&1 | tail -40; fi
